name: zombie_rider.live_camp_light_band_mcw
description: Live camp-light rider row: staged mature-world fires feed the real live light signal hook, two staged riders are observed by the overmap AI bridge, and the artifact records bounded band formation with circle-harass posture rather than permanent camp doom.

steps.label: post_load_rider_camp_light_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged mature-world camp-light rider fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_mature_before_rider_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected mature-world midnight turn before live camp-light window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight in a mature-world turn window before rider camp-light pressure

steps.label: audit_saved_no_human_npcs_before_rider_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save still contained overmap NPC human targets before the zombie-rider camp-light window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-overmap metadata proves no NPC human target can substitute for the player/camp-light setup

steps.label: audit_saved_zombie_riders_before_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain the two required rider footing records
steps.expected_visible_fact: two hostile zombie riders start far enough out to feed the live convergence/band hook

steps.label: audit_saved_fire_fields_before_rider_camp_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove any staged bright fire field near the player
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-map metadata proves staged fd_fire camp-light sources before live turns advance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_rider_camp_light
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live camp-light window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_rider_camp_light_signal_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window reaches the camp-light signal cadence and records rider light interest, capped two-rider selection, band formation, and circle-harass posture

steps.label: audit_zombie_rider_camp_light_band_trace
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked the live zombie-rider camp-light/band trace or the underlying horde light signal
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves nearby live fire observations aggregate into one bounded camp-light rider signal, selecting a capped two-rider band with circle-harass posture

evidence_contract.claim: staged mature-world camp lights enter the live light-signal path, aggregate as one nearby camp-light cluster, and feed zombie-rider overmap convergence into a capped two-rider band with circle-harass posture
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses harness-only game_turn, remove-overmap-NPC, map_fields, and active_monsters save transforms plus saved-turn/NPC/rider/fire audits before live turns; it proves a nearby live camp-light cluster hook, not natural discovery, persistent rider travel, or physical camp assault navigation
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for zombie-rider camp-light attraction behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live source-hook and same-run artifact behavior; persistent overmap migration/camp assault remains future-only unless promoted.
